Description: Scope creep from client introducing features outside agreed requirements
Mitigation Plan: Enforce formal change request process. Weekly scope review with client PM. All requests logged in change register.
Notes: Three informal feature requests received in March alone. Meeting scheduled with Jonathan Hayes to reset expectations.

Description: Legacy data quality issues causing migration failures or data corruption
Mitigation Plan: Implement pre-migration data cleansing scripts. Run validation checks after each batch. Maintain rollback capability for 72 hours.
Notes: 3.2% of records flagged with malformed dates. Cleansing scripts in development. No impact on go-live if resolved by April 4.

Description: Key team member (Derek Russo) is single point of failure for legacy system knowledge
Mitigation Plan: Document all legacy system procedures. Schedule knowledge transfer sessions. Create runbook for critical operations.
Notes: Two knowledge transfer sessions completed. Runbook 60% complete. Derek has agreed to be available for 4 weeks post-cutover.

Description: Extended project hold causes team skill atrophy and stakeholder disengagement
Mitigation Plan: Maintain monthly check-in with portal team. Keep documentation current. Schedule restart readiness review 2 weeks before planned resumption.
Notes: Project on hold since March 16. UX research findings documented. Risk increases if hold extends beyond May.

Description: Agency selection delays compressing creative development timeline
Mitigation Plan: Parallel-track agency evaluation. Have backup agency identified. Build 2-week buffer into creative timeline.
Notes: Three agencies shortlisted. Presentations scheduled for April 2-3. Decision expected by April 8.
